run_summary.summary: New paid inbound from Wise Block (via Make Wonder INC agency): Iris replied to Liz's follow-up with a paid offer — 1 YouTube/Instagram Video for the Botanical Series, cash fee TBD, product launch April 25-30. They're waiting on Liz's rate. Very time-sensitive. Linkind SP6 Smart Solar Lights ($2k) is in active content: Liz confirmed she's editing on Apr 24, and the agency needs it by Mon/Tue April 27-28 with detailed creative notes from the client. Also flagging: Bark ($750 TikTok + Whitelisting) was due today per agency check-in; JLab March Campaign ($2k, due April 20) is 4 days overdue with a form/payment issue — JLab had the wrong email for Liz; and Antique Candle Co ($1,500 story shares for June flash sale) appears in agency check-in — verify it has a card on the board.

suggestions.message: Iris from Make Wonder INC is waiting on Liz's quotation for the Wise Block Botanical Series — 1 YouTube/Instagram Video, competitive cash fee. Product launch is April 25-30 (tomorrow!). Reply to iris@makewondermcn.com today with your rate.
Bark (1 TikTok + Whitelisting, $750) was due today April 24 per agency check-in. Is content live/submitted? Check the Bark Drive folder or ping Mariah.

JLab March Campaign ($2k, 1 Reel/Story) was due April 20 and is now 4 days overdue. JLab had the wrong email for Liz's registration form — agency says form + payment should be coming ASAP. Verify with Mariah or JLab directly that the form got through.
Agency check-in lists Antique Candle Co (2 story shares, $1,500) for a Clearance flash sale June 18-22. Make sure this has a card on the board — it hasn't shown up in any of my recent scans.

deals.next_action: Send rate/quotation to Iris for 1 YouTube/Instagram Video (Wise Block Botanical Series)

Offer: 1 YouTube/Instagram Video, competitive cash fee (amount TBD), free Wise Block Botanical Series set (Sakura Zen, Pine Breath, Maple Whisper, Blossom Harmony), Key Partner status. Product launch: April 25-30. Iris asking for Liz's quotation. Prior Bedsure relationship — same agency (Make Wonder INC/iris@makewondermcn.com).
deals.activity_note: Apr 23: Inbound paid offer — Wise Block Botanical Series via Make Wonder INC (Iris). Liz was already following up. Needs rate response ASAP — launch imminent.

deals.next_action: Finish editing Linkind SP6 solar lights video and submit to agency
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Liz confirmed she's editing solar lights content — asked agency about creative brief (not visible in Drive folder). Agency had shared detailed client feedback on Apr 23: nighttime lighting effects should dominate (~50% of video), show app controls and pattern switching, avoid filming in daylight, correct lens position, clear voiceover/visual alignment, logical structure. Agency requesting content delivery by Mon/Tue April 27-28.
